title: opt_share: unsound optimization (missing sequential signal bits check)

features.name: shared addition with bit-select replication in ternary
features.description: Code should include a wire with addition result that is bit-selected and replicated, while a ternary operator uses a different addition in its branches, triggering incorrect optimization via opt_share
features.snippet:
wire [3:0] t = A + C;
assign Y = S ? A + B : {4{t[0]}};
